# sploot-026: wrapped thumbnail route criterion

Priority: P1 | Status: ready

## Goal
Serve grid thumbnails instead of full originals.

## Oracle
- [ ] The list/shuffle (`assets/route.ts`), search (`vectorSearch`), and similar (`similar/route.ts`) read paths return
    `thumbnailUrl`, so grid tiles source the 256px thumbnail (with the existing
    thumbnailâ†’blob error fallback intact).
